title: BEM-865 list workflows
objective:
Run script:
"""
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem865_workflow_list')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
wfdir = Path('.github/workflows')
count = 0
if wfdir.exists():
    for f in sorted(wfdir.glob('*')):
        if f.is_file():
            safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in f.name)
            marker = outdir / (str(count).zfill(2) + '_' + safe + '.md')
            text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')[:5000]
            flags = []
            low = (f.name + '\n' + text).lower()
            for token in ['claude', 'auditor', 'curator', 'workflow_dispatch', 'anthropic', 'from_claude']:
                if token in low:
                    flags.append(token)
            marker.write_text('# workflow file\nPath: ' + str(f) + '\nFlags: ' + ', '.join(flags) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
            changed_files.append(str(marker))
            count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_WORKFLOW_LIST_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-865 workflow list\nCount: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('listed workflow files: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
